name: persona-lab
description: Launch task-specific AI persona panels for UI, product, and workflow review.

interface.shortDescription: Launch task-specific persona panels for UI, product, and workflow review.
interface.longDescription: Persona Lab turns a user request into a focused review panel: infer likely perspectives, check access and intent, define measurements, launch independent persona passes, and report findings with evidence.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run a persona panel for this request. Select task-specific perspectives, verify execution access, define measurements, launch the review, and report findings.
